headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Arthur J. Gallagher, Raises Price Target to $255
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Bob Huang   maintains Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $240 to $255.
